step3.title: What factors influenced you to feel

success.title: Good job! Mood recorded
success.description: Keep tracking your mood every day for better self-awareness

plans.description: We're working on exciting new features that will help you achieve your goals more effectively

taskManagement.title: Task Management
taskManagement.description: Create, organize and track your tasks. Use tags, priorities and deadlines for effective planning.

goalAlignment.title: Goal Alignment
goalAlignment.description: Link tasks to long-term goals. Track progress and visualize your path to achievement.

habitTracker.title: Habit Tracker
habitTracker.description: Form beneficial habits. Set reminders and monitor completion statistics.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Get smart recommendations for planning, task decomposition and workflow optimization.

calendarSync.title: Calendar Sync
calendarSync.description: Integrate your tasks with Google Calendar and Apple Calendar. Manage all events in one place.

explore.description: We're working on a platform that will help you find the perfect specialist for personal growth

smartMatching.title: Smart Specialist Matching
smartMatching.description: Find coaches and psychologists by specialization, experience, price and other parameters. AI algorithm will help match a specialist to your specific request.

videoChat.title: Video & Chat
videoChat.description: Communicate with specialists through secure video chat right in the app. Save chat history and session materials.

scheduling.title: Convenient Scheduling
scheduling.description: Book sessions at convenient times. Automatic reminders and calendar synchronization.

security.title: Security & Privacy
security.description: All specialists undergo thorough verification. Your data and communications are securely protected.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose a theme that suits you
